item.title: Trump admin steps up next phase of effort to protect children’s health
item.description: The Trump administration targets lead poisoning risks to children as the EPA reallocates unused state funds and launches new public awareness tools.

item.title: Over a dozen Dems demand Trump admin protect Iranians living in the US
item.description: Democrats signed a letter urging the Trump administration to shield Iranians in the U.S. who cannot safely return to the Middle Eastern nation.

item.title: Democrat Beyer blasts GOP plan to counter Virginia redistricting by eliminating his seat
item.description: A GOP lawmaker proposes giving Arlington and Alexandria back to Washington, D.C., after Virginia voters approved a new Democratic-favored district map...

item.title: Newsom-backed law lets illegal immigrant child rapist seek early release again as DA urges 'stop the madness'
item.description: An illegal immigrant convicted of raping his stepdaughter was granted early parole under a California law signed by Gov. Newsom, sparking outrage.

item.title: Senate hopeful says US should be 'far more cooperative' with China to fight climate change
item.description: Far-left Maine Senate hopeful Graham Platner drew criticism for urging U.S.-China cooperation to fight climate change.
